messages.High: URGENT: Sleep below 6h raises stress risk. Aim 7-8h tonight and avoid screens 1h before bed.
messages.Moderate: Sleep was low. Aim for 7+ hours tonight and keep a consistent schedule.
messages.Low: Maintain your sleep schedule: 7-8h protects against stress.

messages.High: URGENT: Overwork is compounding stress. Log off now and protect recovery time.
messages.Moderate: Work hours are high. Set a firm end-time for tomorrow.
messages.Low: You worked long but are coping well. Maintain work boundaries.

messages.High: URGENT: Write top 3 priorities before logging off to reduce mental burden.
messages.Moderate: Pending tasks are piling up. Prioritise 3 for tomorrow morning.
messages.Low: Task backlog is manageable. Spend 5 min planning tomorrow.

messages.High: URGENT: Distractions are significantly increasing stress. Set a quiet block and reduce interruptions.
messages.Moderate: Reduce home distractions. Set quiet hours with your household.
messages.Low: Distractions were high, but you managed well.

messages.High: URGENT: Take a 20-min brisk walk as soon as possible.
messages.Moderate: Schedule a 20-min walk tomorrow; exercise is your stress buffer.
messages.Low: Even gentle daily movement maintains resilience.

messages.High: URGENT: Set a 5-min break every 90 min tomorrow.
messages.Moderate: Aim for at least 3 short breaks tomorrow.
messages.Low: Regular breaks are protecting you. Keep this habit.

messages.High: High caffeine may amplify stress. Replace afternoon coffee with herbal tea.
messages.Moderate: Reduce caffeine to 3-4 cups maximum tomorrow.
messages.Low: Keep caffeine moderate; stay below 4 cups.

messages.High: Meeting load is high. Protect a 2-hour deep-work block tomorrow.
messages.Moderate: Batch meetings tomorrow. Protect at least one 90-min focus block.
messages.Low: Many meetings, but you handled it. Protect focus time proactively.

defaults.High: Multiple stress indicators are elevated. Try 4-7-8 breathing: inhale 4s, hold 7s, exhale 8s x 3.
defaults.Moderate: Stress is moderate. Take a short walk, review priorities, and ensure 7-8h sleep.
defaults.Low: Stress indicators look healthy. Keep maintaining your sleep, exercise, and break routines.
